description: You are a spatial designer for a local independent bookseller. They have leased a vacant 100-square-meter commercial space to open a new bookstore with an adjoining cafe. Layout the space in Sweet Home 3D to balance retail storage with hospitality seating. Your design must include at least two interior partition walls to create an enclosed staff room or separate the cafe prep area. Furnish the Retail Zone with at least 10 bookcases and one checkout counter, and the Cafe Zone with at least three tables, six chairs, and one appliance. Identify the areas with at least three text labels and document main aisle widths with at least two dimension lines for ADA accessibility review. Save the completed design.
